_comment: Machine preset for BAM-Desktop. Auto-applied on first launch when unconfigured (see EarcrateCore._seed_from_machine_defaults). DRIVE RULE: C: is never used; everything that persists lives on D: (the 16 TB DataArray), and the hot regenerable cache is routed to S: (Dev-NVMe). Delete this file, set EARCRATE_DEFAULTS to a different path, or just POST /api/config to override.
